commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=9b5dc8dd72afa410ace4d1537c3e7f86bf7f219a)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds per-call max_tokens/max_completion_tokens clamping in buildOpenAICompletionsParams based on estimated message and system-prompt tokens, plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection shows current main forwards the resolved max-token cap without subtracting prompt tokens, and the linked report provides the StepFun rejection shape. I did not run a live StepFun request in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Human/contributor action is needed because the patch undercounts serialized prompt content and missing real behavior proof blocks merge automation.

target.title: fix(agents): reserve 25% context window for input tokens in maxTokens calculation
target.author: linux2010

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
